name: VIVARIUM
description: Sovereign process heartbeat dashboard. Discovers what you are running — nothing hardcoded. Pushes live snapshots to Canvas VIVARIUM tab. Auto-refresh toggle included.
author: Victory

tools.name: vivarium_status
tools.description: Take a heartbeat snapshot — system stats + discovered processes. Pushes to Canvas VIVARIUM tab.

tools.name: vivarium_start
tools.description: Start auto-refresh. Optional interval in seconds (default 10, min 5, max 300).

tools.name: vivarium_watch
tools.description: Show or update the watch config. Add custom process labels.
